title: Logicates
description: Adds diverse redstone components into your game
body:
This mod is part of the RED LOGIC series.
Logicates • Enhanced Workbenches


**Logicates** are special redstone components of diverse nature, including **Logic Gates**, **sensors** and other useful gadgets for your redstone circuits. **Getting Started** First off, use a Stonecutter to cut stone slabs into **Logicate Plates**:

Then, use the plates to craft a **Logicate Fabricator**:

Insert Logicate Plates, Redstone Dust, Redstone Torches, Nether Quartz, Levers and Tripwire Hooks to be able to craft all kinds of Logicates:

You may see all Logicate Fabrication recipes using [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-items). **Discord**
